purpose: Ingest, retrieve, reindex and roll back evidence-linked knowledge records safely.
steps: Validate source identity, hash and permission scope.
Write canonical record and immutable provenance coordinates.
Index lexical representation and optional vector representation separately.
Run permission, freshness, duplicate and contradiction checks.
Run expected-answer retrieval tests before promotion.
Record latency, recall, citation precision and cost.
Promote only after deterministic tests pass or an approved waiver exists.
On rollback, remove derived indexes, restore prior snapshot and retain audit evidence.
rollback: Restore last verified index snapshot and replay only verified source records.
